Priority: HIGH
Type: feature | fix | refactor

# Task description
This is where you'll describe the task to be implemented.

# DNA Document
This document will contain the final merged system, detailing the overall architecture and key integrations.

# Roadmap
This document outlines the planned features, enhancements, and timeline for delivery.

# Changelog
All notable changes to this project will be documented here.

# Project Title
A brief description of what this project is about.

# Knowledge Base
This serves as the AI's memory, containing essential learnings and insights about the project.

# SOURCE MAP
## auth/login.js
- Source: original repo
- Modified: YES
- Changes: JWT → Token system v2

VERSION: 1.4.2
STATUS: stable
LAST_UPDATED: 2026-05-04

# CI workflow
This file contains the CI pipeline configurations.

# Build workflow
This file contains the configurations for building the application.

# Test workflow
This file contains the details for testing the application.

# Preview workflow
This file contains configurations for previewing the build.

# Versioning workflow
- Reads VERSION.md
- Auto-increment (patch/minor/major)

# Tagging workflow
- Creates Git tags:
v1.4.2

# Release Notes workflow
- Generates release notes from:
   * Task.md
   * CHANGELOG.md

# Deploy workflow
This file manages the deployment process.

# Release workflow
This handles the release of versions.

# Task Runner workflow
This file initiates tasks based on Task.md.

# AI Agent workflow
This file manages the AI processes for the project.

# Merger workflow
Handles merging changes into the main branch.

# DNA Sync workflow
This file synchronizes the DNA document with system changes.

# Validator workflow
Validates the changes before merging.

# Docker Build workflow
- Build Docker image
- Tag with version

# Docker Push workflow
- Push the Docker image to DockerHub

# Hugging Face Sync workflow
- Sync to Hugging Face repo
- Uses:
hf.Dockerfile

#!/bin/bash

# Task Runner Script
if [[ -f docs/Task.md ]]; then
    echo "Executing tasks from Task.md"
    # Custom execution logic here
else
    echo "No tasks found."
fi

FROM node:16
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN npm install
CMD ["npm", "start"]

FROM hf.Dockerfile
# Additional configurations for Hugging Face integration

DATABASE_URL=your_database_url
API_KEY=your_api_key
